name: Country Codes
description: ISO 3166-1 country names with their alpha-2 and alpha-3 codes.

fields.name: name
fields.title: Country name
fields.description: Common English short name of the country.

licenses.name: ODbL-1.0
licenses.title: Open Data Commons Open Database License 1.0

name: World Population 2022
description: Estimated mid-year population for a sample of countries.

name: CO₂ Emissions per Capita
description: Tonnes of CO₂ emitted per person for a sample of countries.

name: Country Indicators (bundle)
description: A multi-resource dataset: reference codes plus population and CO₂ indicators for a sample of countries.

resources.name: codes
resources.title: Country codes
resources.description: ISO 3166-1 names with alpha-2 and alpha-3 codes.

resources.name: co2
resources.title: CO₂ emissions per capita
resources.description: Tonnes of CO₂ emitted per person.

name: Fruit Sales
description: Monthly fruit units sold and revenue — a small tabular sample.

name: Region Metrics
description: Regional sales and ratings, queried in your browser with SQL over DuckDB-Wasm. This resource is Parquet, so the showcase opens a SQL editor instead of a flat preview; point it at a remote Parquet on data.portaljs.com and DuckDB range-reads it in place.

resources.name: data
resources.title: Region metrics
resources.query:
SELECT region, round(avg(rating), 2) AS avg_rating, sum(sales) AS total_sales
FROM data
GROUP BY region
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;

name: World Country Boundaries
description: Country boundaries for the whole world in two serverless geo tiers derived from the same Natural Earth source: a PMTiles archive the map renders in place (any size, no tile server), and a GeoParquet twin DuckDB-Wasm runs spatial SQL over in place — bbox pre-filter to prune Parquet row groups, then ST_Intersects, rendered as a live overlay. Render tier + query tier on one dataset.

resources.name: tiles
resources.title: Boundaries (PMTiles — render tier)
resources.description: Vector tiles rendered by MapLibre GL over HTTP range requests; only the tiles in view are fetched, so any dataset size pans and zooms with no tile server.

resources.name: geo
resources.title: Boundaries (GeoParquet — query tier)
resources.description: GeoParquet 1.1 (Hilbert-sorted, covering bbox column) queried in place with DuckDB-Wasm + spatial. Pan the map and “Query viewport” to fetch only the features in view; click a feature for its full attributes via a DuckDB point-in-polygon lookup.
resources.query:
-- bbox-first: the covering bbox prunes Parquet row groups (cheap),
-- then ST_Intersects refines to the exact predicate (only on survivors).
SELECT name, continent, pop_est, ST_AsGeoJSON(geometry) AS geojson
FROM data
WHERE bbox.xmin <= 40 AND bbox.xmax >= -25
  AND bbox.ymin <= 72 AND bbox.ymax >= 34
  AND ST_Intersects(geometry, ST_MakeEnvelope(-25, 34, 40, 72))
